---
title: "clustering"
author: "Imali Punsara"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
library(tidyr)

```

# Load the dataset
```{r}
library(readr)
healthexpenditurebyareaandsource <- read_csv("healthexpenditurebyareaandsource.csv")
View(healthexpenditurebyareaandsource)
```

# Select relevant numerical columns for clustering
```{r}
# Load necessary library
library(dplyr)

# Ensure df is correctly assigned
df <- healthexpenditurebyareaandsource  # Use the correct data set name

# Select relevant column and remove missing values
data_cluster <- df %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>%  # Ensure it's a data frame
  select(real_expenditure_millions) %>% 
  na.omit()
```

# Standardizing the data
```{r}
data_scaled <- scale(data_cluster)
```

# Ensure data has at least 2 dimensions for clustering visualization
```{r}
if (ncol(data_scaled) < 2) {
  data_scaled <- cbind(data_scaled, runif(nrow(data_scaled)))
}

```


# 1. K-Means Clustering
```{r}
set.seed(123)  # Correct function name
kmeans_result <- kmeans(data_scaled, centers = 3, nstart = 25)
df$cluster_kmeans <- as.factor(kmeans_result$cluster)

# Visualizing clusters
library(factoextra)  # Ensure factorextra is installed
fviz_cluster(list(data = data_scaled, cluster = kmeans_result$cluster)) +
  labs(title = "K-Means Clustering on Health Expenditure")

```



```{r}
Dset.seed(123)
kmeans_result <- kmeans(data_scaled, centers = 3, nstart = 25)
df$cluster_kmeans <- as.factor(kmeans_result$cluster)

fviz_cluster(list(data = data_scaled, cluster = kmeans_result$cluster)) +
  labs(title = "K-Means Clustering on Health Expenditure")

```

# 2. Hierarchical Clustering
```{r}
hc_result <- hclust(dist(data_scaled), method = "ward.D2")
plot(hc_result, main = "Dendrogram for Hierarchical Clustering", sub = "", xlab = "")
rect.hclust(hc_result, k = 3, border = "red")

```


# Ensure required packages are installed
```{r}
if (!requireNamespace("dbscan", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("dbscan")
if (!requireNamespace("mclust", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("mclust")

```


# 3. DBSCAN Clustering
```{r}
library(dbscan)
dbscan_result <- dbscan::dbscan(data_scaled, eps = 0.5, minPts = 5)
df$cluster_dbscan <- as.factor(dbscan_result$cluster)

fviz_cluster(list(data = data_scaled, cluster = dbscan_result$cluster)) +
  labs(title = "DBSCAN Clustering on Health Expenditure")

```

# 4. Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) Clustering
```{r}
library(mclust)
gmm_result <- Mclust(data_scaled)
df$cluster_gmm <- as.factor(gmm_result$classification)

fviz_cluster(list(data = data_scaled, cluster = gmm_result$classification)) +
  labs(title = "Gaussian Mixture Model Clustering on Health Expenditure")

```
